tools.name: design_to_code
tools.description: Generate UI code for a given node or the currently selected node in the Pixso desktop app. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

clientFrameworks.description: The client framework for the current context. Supported values: `react`, `vue`, `html`, `arkui`, `flutter`. Default is `html` if unknown. This is used for logging to understand which frameworks are being used.

tools.name: get_image
tools.description: Generate an image for a given node or the currently selected node in the Pixso desktop app. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

clientFrameworks.description: The client framework for the current context. Supported values: `react`, `vue`, `html`, `arkui`, `flutter`. Default is `html` if unknown. This is used for logging to understand which frameworks are being used.

tools.name: get_node_dsl
tools.description: Generate the DSL of the node for a given node or the currently selected node in the Pixso desktop app. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

clientFrameworks.description: The client framework for the current context. Supported values: `react`, `vue`, `html`, `arkui`, `flutter`. Default is `html` if unknown. This is used for logging to understand which frameworks are being used.

tools.name: get_variants
tools.description: Generate the variants of the node for a given node or the currently selected node in the Pixso desktop app. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

tools.name: get_variables
tools.description: Get all variables of the variable set by the variable set ID

variableSetId.description: The ID of the variable set, eg. "123:456".

tools.name: get_export_image
tools.description: Generate the export image of the node for a given node or the currently selected node in the Pixso desktop app. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

value.description: Constraint value: when type=1 represents scale ratio (e.g. 1 for 100%), when type=2 represents width in pixels, when type=3 represents height in pixels

constraint.description: Export image constraint settings for controlling image dimensions and scaling，when imageType is SVG, type and value must be 1

svgDataName.description: When the image type is SVG, svgDataName value must be false

svgForceStrokeMask.description: When the image type is SVG, svgForceStrokeMask value must be false

svgOutLine.description: When the image type is SVG, svgOutLine value must be false

svgIDMode.description: When the image type is SVG, svgIDMode value must be 0

imageType.description: The type of the exported image, eg. 1=PNG, 2=JPEG, 3=SVG, 4=PDF, 5=SKETCH, 6=EPS, 7=TIFF, 8=WEBP

suffix.description: Custom suffix appended to the image name. For example: default is "11.png", if "ccc" is passed, the exported image name will be "11ccc.png"

tools.name: create_instance
tools.description: Create an instance based on the component key

componentKey.description: The key of the component to create the instance

tools.name: set_bound_variables
tools.description: Bind variables to the node or text attributes. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

index.description: The index of the attribute to bind to the node, the index is 0-based, when fieldName is VariableBindableSpecialField, this parameter is required

fieldName.description: The attribute key to bind to the node, the attribute key can be a node attribute key or a text attribute key

variable.description: The variable to bind to the node attribute, id and assetRef must pass one, not both, if isRemote is true, assetRef is required, else id is required，if you want to remove the variable, set variable to null

bindings.description: The bindings to apply, array items describe the node, field and variable payload.

tools.name: set_fill_style
tools.description: Set the fill style of the node. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

styleKey.description: The key of the color style to set. The key of the style is the key of the style in the style library, if you want to remove the style, pass in an empty string

tools.name: set_stroke_style
tools.description: Set the stroke style of the node. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

styleKey.description: The key of the color style to set. The key of the style is the key of the style in the style library, if you want to remove the style, pass in an empty string

tools.name: set_text_style
tools.description: Set the text style of the text node. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

styleKey.description: The key of the text style to set. The key of the style is the key of the style in the style library, if you want to remove the style, pass in an empty string

tools.name: set_grid_style
tools.description: Set the grid style of the node. Use the itemId parameter to specify a item id. If no item id is provided, the currently selected item will be used. If a URL is provided, extract the item id from the URL. For example, if given the URL https://any-host/app/design/:fileName?item-id=1:2, the extracted itemId would be `1:2`

itemId.description: The ID of the node in the Pixso document, eg. "123:456". This should be a valid node ID in the Pixso document.

styleKey.description: The key of the grid style to set. The key of the style is the key of the style in the style library, if you want to remove the style, pass in an empty string

tools.name: code_to_design
tools.description: Convert an HTML string or a ZIP archive (containing HTML/CSS/assets) into a Pixso design node and paste it onto the current canvas.

htmlStr.description: Raw HTML string to convert. Provide either htmlStr or htmlBuffer, not both.

htmlBuffer.description: ZIP archive bytes (as a number array) containing the HTML project to convert. Provide either htmlStr or htmlBuffer, not both.
